title: The True Backrooms Experience
description: This is a modpack that adds and changes the games to be the backrooms.
body:
# The True Backrooms Experience
This is a modpack that consist of a few mods to make the game more like the backrooms. Their are 3 main mods that are **_NOT_** from modrinth. And those mods are **_The [Accurate Backrooms](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-accurate-backrooms), [Camera Overhaul](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/camera-overhaul-forge), and [Pollution Of the Realms](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/pollution-of-the-realms) and it's lib mod._**. This modpack uses Spooklementary shaders or Epoch Shaders. and that is a pretty heavy shader, and it's modified to fit my astethic with the config **for both**, and changing the src code **for Epoch shaders**. So it may lag.
But remember... do not sleep in the backrooms. As if you do THEIR IS NO HOPE FOR YOU :)
